infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RestoreAssist needs camera access to capture inspection photos of water damage for compliance reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RestoreAssist needs photo library access to attach existing photos to inspections.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RestoreAssist needs location access to auto-tag inspection data with GPS coordinates for insurance compliance.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RestoreAssist needs background location to track technician routes during restoration jobs.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: RestoreAssist connects to Bluetooth moisture meters to capture readings automatically.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: RestoreAssist connects to Bluetooth moisture meters to capture readings automatically.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: RestoreAssist needs background location to track technician routes during restoration jobs.

plugins.cameraPermission: RestoreAssist needs camera access to capture inspection photos.

plugins.photosPermission: RestoreAssist needs photo library access to attach photos to inspections.
